generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic Speed Controller interfaced with Jetson Orin Nano for real-time motor voltage control based on PID logic derived from desired speed commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Servo mechanism controlled via Jetson Orin Nano through ROS2 nodes for directional control of the autonomous vehicle chassis"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D environmental perception sensor generating raw point clouds for object detection and spatial mapping"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435IDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera providing additional spatial data acquisition for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraFrameDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded sensors measuring ego vehicle state parameters including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    DTDFVocab:transmissionProtocol ROS2
    DTDFVocab:transmissionLatencyTarget "≤100 ms"
]

instance DepthCameraFrameDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435IDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:transmissionProtocol ROS2
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    DTDFVocab:transmissionProtocol ROS2
    DTDFVocab:transmissionLatencyTarget "≤100 ms"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensorFusionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:transmissionProtocol ROS2
]

instance ControlCommandsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:transmissionProtocol ROS2
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for point cloud segmentation combined with Kalman filter for object tracking in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorFusionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ActuationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "PID control logic converting desired speed commands to motor voltage for vehicle actuation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlCommandsDataTransmitted
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant speed adjustment logic for Performance Class I Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DataStorageModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SQL database implementation for storing time-series data including object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D rendering pipeline using ROS2 and custom Python/C++ nodes for real-time object and path visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance RawLidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unprocessed 3D point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModel
]

instance DepthCameraFrameData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth camera frames from Intel Deepsense D435i for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraFrameDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorFusionEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed ego vehicle state including speed and steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlModel
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived object tracks containing position and velocity information from sensor fusion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DetectedObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageModel
]

instance ControlData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control commands including desired speed and emergency braking signals"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControlCommandsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ActuationModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SensorFusionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based node implementing sensor fusion of LiDAR and depth camera data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectDetectionService
    DTDFVocab:enables DetectedObjectTracksDataTransmitted
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom ROS2 message serialization and unit conversion logic (e.g., m/s ↔ km/h) for data alignment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Centralized processing unit hosted on Jetson Orin Nano or cloud consolidating data collection, processing, and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization pipeline using ROS2 and custom Python/C++ nodes for real-time object and path rendering"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database interface for storing and generating human-readable reports of time-series data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance ControlPanelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "User interface for remote control of ACC subsystem including enable/disable and speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance ObjectDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time object detection and tracking service providing position and velocity data for surrounding objects"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control system implementing lead vehicle detection and speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedOptimizationAction
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service displaying ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceVisualizationInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control interface for enabling/disabling ACC and adjusting desired speed parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCConfigurationAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating human-readable reports of time-series data for historical analysis and diagnostics"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceReportInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual and data representation of detected object tracks including position and velocity information"
]

instance PerformanceVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path for performance monitoring"
]

instance SpeedOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic fuel economy adjustments based on DT-generated optimal speed profiles"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic emergency braking system activation based on collision risk assessment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote configuration of ACC parameters including enable/disable and desired speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MaintenanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven maintenance reports including brake system health analysis and historical time-series data"
]

// C12: Physical Twin Entity
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:PhysicalTwin [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle chassis hosting Jetson Orin Nano and sensor suite for real-time perception and actuation"
    DTDFVocab:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    DTDFVocab:contains IntelDeepsenseD435IDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:contains VehicleStateSensor
    DTDFVocab:contains MotorActuationController
    DTDFVocab:contains SteeringServoActuator
    DTDFVocab:contains SensorFusionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:contains ActuationModel
]

// C13: Digital Twin Entity
instance DigitalTwinEntityHost : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Centralized processing unit hosted on Jetson Orin Nano or cloud infrastructure for ACC system computations"
    DTDFVocab:contains ACCControlModel
    DTDFVocab:contains DataStorageModel
    DTDFVocab:contains VisualizationModel
    DTDFVocab:contains DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:contains ReportingEnabler
    DTDFVocab:contains ControlPanelEnabler
]

// C14: Communication Infrastructure
instance ROS2CommunicationBus : DTDFVocab:CommunicationInfrastructure [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware enabling inter-node communication and hardware abstraction for all data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:connects PhysicalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:connects DigitalTwinEntityHost
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Hardware [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer providing compute resources for perception, processing, and control"
    DTDFVocab:hosts PhysicalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:hosts DigitalTwinEntityHost
]

instance WiFiCommunication : DTDFVocab:CommunicationInfrastructure [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi network enabling real-time data transmission between physical and digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:connects PhysicalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:connects DigitalTwinEntityHost
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interactions involve:
  - **Control signals** (e.g., desired speed, emergency braking commands) generated by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the **Digital Twin Entity**.
  - **Actuation commands** converted to **motor voltage commands** via the **Actuation FE** in the **Physical Twin Entity**.
  - **Remote management commands** (e.g., ACC enable/disable, desired speed modification) sent from the **User Entity** to the **Physical Twin Entity** via **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi**, with a **latency constraint of ≤100 ms** (3GPP TS 22.185 compliance)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates at **real-time scales** with the following time constraints:
  - **End-to-end latency** between PT and DT Entity: **≤100 ms** (aligned with 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication).
  - **Clock synchronization accuracy**: **±100 ms** across components (ROS2-based time synchronization).
  - **Perception cycle frequency**: **~10–30 Hz** for LiDAR/camera data processing (DBSCAN clustering + Kalman filtering).
  - **Control loop frequency**: **~10 Hz** for ACC computations (lead vehicle detection and speed adjustment)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation is orchestrated as follows:
  - **Physical Twin (PT)**: Hosts **sensors (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering servo)**, and **ROS2 nodes** for local processing.
  - **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)**: Centralized component running on **Jetson Orin Nano** or cloud, responsible for **data collection**, **ACC computation**, and **reporting**.
  - **User Entity (UE)**: Decentralized UI with **3D Visualization** (ROS2-rendered) and **Control Panel** (remote command interface).
  - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures seamless communication via **ROS2** (intra-entity) and **Wi-Fi** (inter-entity, ≤100 ms latency).
  The constellation adheres to the **ISO 23247 reference architecture**, with deviations including the **Physical Twin Entity** (not in the standard) and split **User Interface FE** into visualization/control components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin supports **design, development, and operational phases** of the ACC system:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for validating ACC algorithms (e.g., ISO 15622 compliance for Performance Class I ACC).
  - **Development Phase**: Enables **remote troubleshooting** via data monitoring and report generation.
  - **Operational Phase**: Provides **real-time optimization** (e.g., fuel economy adjustments) and **predictive maintenance** (e.g., brake system health monitoring via integrated simulators like CREO Simulate).
  The DT represents the **as-manufactured and as-operated** states of the PT, bridging **3D CAD designs** (for simulation) and **real-world sensor data** (for validation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Sensor Fusion Accuracy**: **DBSCAN + Kalman filter** for object tracking, validated against ground truth (e.g., manual annotation).
  - **Control Fidelity**: **ISO 15622-compliant ACC algorithm** implemented in the **Controlling FE**, tested for **Performance Class I** requirements.
  - **Latency Validation**: **ROS2 network benchmarking** to confirm **≤100 ms end-to-end delay** (3GPP TS 22.185 compliance).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: **ROS2 time synchronization** with **±100 ms accuracy** (hardware-limited).
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: **No explicit uncertainty quantification** mentioned; relies on sensor noise mitigation via filtering."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
  - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (PT ↔ DTE).
  - **Data Transport**: **ROS2** for intra-entity communication (PT/DTE ↔ UE).
  - **Message Serialization**: Custom **ROS2 message types** with unit conversions (e.g., **m/s ↔ km/h**).
  - **Latency Mechanism**: **ROS2 QoS policies** configured for **real-time guarantees** (≤100 ms).
  - **Security**: **No explicit security protocols** mentioned (e.g., TLS, encryption); assumes trusted local network."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin (PT)**: Deployed on the **1/10-scale autonomous vehicle** with **Jetson Orin Nano** as the primary compute platform.
  - **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)**: Initially deployed on the **Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard PT) but scalable to **cloud infrastructure** for offloading compute-intensive tasks (e.g., AI simulation).
  - **User Entity (UE)**: Deployed on a **remote workstation** with **ROS2 bridge** for visualization and control.
  - **Data Storage**: **SQL database** hosted externally to the PT (e.g., cloud or local server)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Simulators**: **CREO Simulate** for predictive maintenance tasks (e.g., brake system prognosis).
  - **Potential IoT Platforms**: **OPC UA** (not implemented but referenced as a future enabler for industrial IoT integration).
  - **Cloud Services**: **Scalable compute resources** (e.g., AWS/GCP) for offloading ACC computations or storing large datasets.
  - **No explicit integration** with other Digital Twins or external automotive systems (e.g., V2X infrastructure) is mentioned."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy considerations are not explicitly detailed in the document, but inferred as follows:
  - **Data Ownership**: Likely **shared between the PT owner (e.g., automotive manufacturer)** and **DT service provider** (e.g., research team/developer), given the **remote management capabilities** and **external data storage**.
  - **Privacy**: **No explicit privacy mechanisms** (e.g., anonymization, access controls) are described. Assumes **trusted local network** for communication (Wi-Fi/ROS2). **No mention of GDPR or similar compliance** for vehicle data."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: **Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework (Part 2: Reference Architecture)** as the foundational framework, with adaptations for automotive use (e.g., **Physical Twin Entity** deviation).
  - **ISO 15622**: **Road Vehicles – Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) Systems** for **Performance Class I** compliance in the ACC implementation.
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: **Service Requirements for V2V Communication**, referenced for the **≤100 ms latency requirement**.
  - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: **Not implemented** but referenced as a potential standard for future data translation/enabling industrial IoT integration."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Safety-Critical Operations**: The DT enables **remote actuation** (e.g., emergency braking) on the PT, requiring **strict latency constraints (≤100 ms)** and **clock synchronization (±100 ms)** to prevent timing-related failures.
  - **No Explicit Security Protocols**: Assumes **trusted local network** for communication (Wi-Fi/ROS2); **no mention of encryption (TLS)**, **authentication**, or **firewall policies**.
  - **Safety Mechanisms**:
    - **Hardware-level redundancy** (e.g., Jetson Orin Nano for compute).
    - **ROS2 QoS policies** for real-time guarantees.
    - **Manual override** via **Human-in-the-Loop** (Liberty to act vs. Ability to act taxonomy).
  - **Ethical Risks**: **Remote management** of autonomous vehicles introduces potential hazards if DT commands are misinterpreted or delayed, though mitigated by **≤100 ms latency** and **ISO 15622 compliance**."
]
